title: UPSC NDA II Online Form 2026 for 394 Post
short_information: Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) has released National Defence Academy NDA & NA Second Examination 2026 Notification. Those candidates who are Interested in this UPSC NDA and NA II Examination 2026 can Apply Online from 20/05/2026 to 09/06/2026. Read the notification for recruitment eligibility, post information, selection procedure, pay scale and all other information. Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) UPSC National Defence Academy & Naval Academy Exam II 2026 UPSC NDA-II Exam 2026 : Short Details of Notification
application_fee: General UR / EWS / OBC : 100/- SC / ST : 0/- Pay the Examination Fee Through Net Banking, Debit Card, Credit Card and Offline Fee Mode Through E Challan UPSC NDA II Eligibility 2026 Army Wing : Passed /Appearing 10+2 Exam in Any Recognized Board in India. For Airforce & Naval Wing : Passed /Appearing 10+2 Exam with Physics & Math Subjects UPSC NDA II

tables.table_name: Interested Candidates Can Read the Full Notification Before Apply Online.
rows: Important Dates Application Begin : 20/05/2026 Last Date for Apply Online : 09/06/2026 upto 06:00 PM only Fee Payment Last Date : 09/06/2026 Correction Form: As per Schedule Exam Held on : 13/09/2026 Admit Card Available : Before Exam
Application Fee General UR / EWS / OBC : 100/- SC / ST : 0/- Pay the Examination Fee Through Net Banking, Debit Card, Credit Card and Offline Fee Mode Through E Challan
UPSC NDA II Eligibility 2026 Army Wing : Passed /Appearing 10+2 Exam in Any Recognized Board in India. For Airforce & Naval Wing : Passed /Appearing 10+2 Exam with Physics & Math Subjects
UPSC NDA II Age Limit 2026 Candidate Not be Born Before : 01/01/2008 Candidates Not be Born After : 01/01/2011 Age Relaxation Extra as per NDA II Exam Notification 2026 Recruitment Rules.
